data.title: The Ether Machine buys 15,000 ETH for $56.9M, total purchases reach 334,757 ETH with $407M left for more.
data.description: In New York City on July 31, 2025, The Ether Machine, a company specializing in ether generation, disclosed that The Ether Reserve LLC had acquired approximately 15,000 ETH at a unit price of $3,809.97 USD, resulting in a total transaction amount of $56,900,000.01 USD. This acquisition is in line with The Ether Machine's strategy of long-term accumulation. As of now, the total ETH acquired and earmarked stands at 334,757, with a reserve of up to $407,000,000 USD available for potential future ETH procurements.

data.title: ID Privacy AI introduces Agentic Voice-First AI BDC Workforce, integrated in 80% of Automotive CRMs. Redefines last-mile dealership AI engagement with persistent-memory AI agents.
data.description: BDC Pro has revolutionized AI engagement in dealership last-mile services by introducing persistent-memory AI agents capable of communication through voice, SMS, email, social, and web platforms. The innovative technology was launched by ID Privacy Inc. in CAPE CORAL, Fla., on July 31, 2025. This upgrade represents a significant advancement in enhancing customer interactions and is set to transform the way businesses operate in this sector.

data.title: Dow futures rise as Amazon, Apple, Reddit stocks surge post-earnings. Trump increasing Canada tariffs. Jobs report awaited.
data.description: Futures contracts on the Dow Jones showed movement as Amazon, Apple, and Reddit saw late shifts in earnings, along with an announcement of increased tariffs on Canada by President Trump. The upcoming jobs report also weighed on market sentiment. Key numbers to watch include the performance of Amazon and Apple stocks, the impact of the tariffs imposed on Canada, and the upcoming release of the jobs report. This information is critical for investors tracking market trends and making informed decisions.

data.title: Phosphorous Trichloride Market to hit $3.46B by 2030, with 7.3% growth. Agrochem sector drives demand. Key players include ICL, LANXESS, Solvay.
data.description: The global Phosphorous Trichloride Market is projected to grow from USD 2.43 billion in 2025 to USD 3.46 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 7.3%. The market is driven by demand in the agricultural sector for organophosphorus agrochemicals, due to the need to increase crop yields to feed a growing population. Key players in the market include companies like Zhejiang Xin'an Chemical Group Co., Ltd., ICL, and LANXESS. The main drivers for market growth are the increasing demand for phosphorus-based agrochemicals and intermediates, while challenges include environmental regulations and unstable supply of key materials. The agrochemicals and pharmaceuticals segment accounts for the largest share of the market.
